mapper.sql: id AS row_id, skin_id, paint_index, name_en, name_zh, base_name_en, base_name_zh, weapon, rarity, min_float, max_float, collection_en, collection_zh, image_url AS image, source, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT skin_id FROM skin_float_range WHERE image_url IS NULL OR image_url = ''
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO skin_float_range ( skin_id, paint_index, name_en, name_zh, base_name_en, base_name_zh, weapon, rarity, min_float, max_float, collection_en, collection_zh, image_url, source, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{row.skinId}, #{row.paintIndex}, #{row.nameEn}, #{row.nameZh}, #{row.baseNameEn}, #{row.baseNameZh}, #{row.weapon}, #{row.rarity}, #{row.minFloat}, #{row.maxFloat}, #{row.collectionEn}, #{row.collectionZh}, #{row.image}, #{row.source}, #{row.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT name_zh, min_float, max_float FROM skin_float_range WHERE name_zh IS NOT NULL AND name_zh <> ''
SELECT DISTINCT collection_zh AS collectionZh, collection_en AS collectionEn FROM skin_float_range WHERE collection_zh IS NOT NULL OR collection_en IS NOT NULL ORDER BY collection_zh ASC
SELECT FROM skin_float_range WHERE collection_zh IS NOT NULL OR collection_en IS NOT NULL ORDER BY collection_zh ASC, collection_en ASC, rarity ASC, name_en ASC
